name: bankingcrm-headless-services
description: MCP Server exposing the underlying Banking CRM core microservices. Enables autonomous AI agents to execute goals across the Retail Walk-in, Digital Lead, and Branch Onboarding journeys.

tools.name: mcp_bankingcrm_ingest_lead
tools.description: Create a new lead entering the Banking CRM pipeline. Requires basic personal info and product interest.

tools.name: mcp_bankingcrm_update_bant
tools.description: Update Budget, Authority, Need, and Timeline qualification parameters for a specific lead.

tools.name: mcp_bankingcrm_convert_lead
tools.description: Convert a fully qualified Lead into a structured Pipeline Opportunity and update the lead status.

tools.name: mcp_bankingcrm_submit_credit_app
tools.description: Submit a credit application for instant triaging (STP or manual review) using core Banking algorithms.

tools.name: mcp_bankingcrm_update_credit_decision
tools.description: Update the decision on an in-progress credit application (Approve, Decline, Counter_Offer).

tools.name: mcp_bankingcrm_save_onboarding_progress
tools.description: Create or save progress on a customer onboarding wizard application step by step.

tools.name: mcp_bankingcrm_complete_onboarding
tools.description: Mark an onboarding application as fully completed and transitioned to a booked status.
